description:
Two small cleanups to the .20 diagnostic infrastructure that landed and then weren't picked up by any caller.

## 1. Re-exports in src/diag/mod.rs

The current pub use block exposes types that nothing imports through the short path:

- DiagCode, Severity, SpanLabel — main.rs / test_runner.rs reference them via the long form (diag::diagnostic::Foo) or via DiagCode constants. Decision: drop the re-exports; convert call sites to qualified paths where needed.
- Renderer — purely internal to the diag module. Drop the re-export entirely.
- ColorMode — also internal. Drop.

KEEP the re-exports for Diagnostic, Diagnostics, SourceMap, Span, FileId, SpanOrigin — these are the load-bearing public API and have callers using the short form.

## 2. Spanned::with_origin builder

src/ast.rs:32. Builder added during .20.2 but never called — the macro expansion path stamps SpanOrigin via the stamp_expanded walkers (src/macros.rs) directly on the node, not through this builder. Delete the method.

If a future ticket finds it wants the builder pattern, it's trivial to reintroduce.

## Deliverable

- -6 warnings total (5 unused imports + 1 unused method).
- One commit.
title: Trim diag re-exports and drop Spanned::with_origin
